name: Troopers26: Crew & Conference Design
description: Designed the complete visual identity for Troopers26, Europe's premier security conference, together with Matthias Ortmann (see his profile via the link). Banners, posters, shirts, bags, lanyards, stickers, patches, stage files and soo much more :D

name: CERN Whitehat Challenge
description: Certified participant in CERN's real-world penetration test program. Conducted security assessments under strict ethical guidelines, focused on web enumeration & OSINT.

name: CTF Mannheim: 2nd Place
description: Placed second in the "CAPTURE THE FLAG" Hacking Challenge 2025 together with a colleague. A great adventure — there's a full writeup on the blog.

name: Black Hat Europe 2025
description: Attended Black Hat Europe in London — my first big security conference. Met awesome people and absorbed hours of talks that somehow managed to hold my ADHD-ridden mind.
